backingDescription: GFI is a protocol/governance token and is not a direct redeemable claim on a specific credit portfolio, fund share, reserve account, note, tranche, or collateral pool. Goldfinch Prime and other private-credit products may have separate product-level exposure, but that structure should not be treated as native GFI backing.

_meta.classificationNote: Reserve layer fields are intentionally null because GFI is a governance/protocol asset. Goldfinch Prime private-credit exposure is product-level context, while GFI itself has no verified reserve, custodian, PoR oracle, or redemption asset.
needsFurtherReview: Verify whether any official document treats GFI as having economic rights to protocol revenue, pools, reserves, or collateral.
If Goldfinch Prime is modeled as a separate Nexus asset, research Heron entities, note structure, underlying BDC/private-credit fund exposure, service providers, and redemption mechanics separately.
